'''Dr'xureretue''' was the owner and operator of [[Docking Bay 87 (Mos Eisley)|Docking Bay 87]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], a settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. A member of the [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Species/Legends|species]], he insisted on being called "'''Drue'''," as he knew his name was difficult to pronounce by numerous beings. Dr'xureretue had a cheerful disposition and was known to introduce newcomers to the laws and habits of Mos Eisley. He was a good source of information and gossip since he would also warn newcomers about how business was conducted in the [[City/Legends|city]].<ref name="GG7" />

Despite his cheerful mannerisms, he would not compromise on matters of business and fees. He owned two [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] that handled the unloading and loading of cargo from the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that berthed in the [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]]. The owner of [[Docking Bay 92]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Dom Antyll]], would complete any repairs and maintenance on ships within Dr'xureretue's mooring. The Ishi Tib also kept the docking bay modernized to maintain its desirability with [[Merchant/Legends|merchants]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].<ref name="GG7" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dr'xurerertue was first mentioned in the [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'', written by [[Martin Wixted]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in [[1993]].<ref name="GG7" />
